en: Now there arose a great outcry of the people and of their wives against their Jewish brothers.
zh: 那時，民眾和他們的妻子大聲呼冤，控告自己的同胞猶大人。

en: For there were those who said, "With our sons and our daughters, we are many. So let us get grain, that we may eat and keep alive."
zh: 有些人說：“我們和兒女人口眾多，給我們五穀餬口，可以存活。”

en: There were also those who said, "We are mortgaging our fields, our vineyards, and our houses to get grain because of the famine."
zh: 有些人說：“我們抵押了自己的田地、葡萄園和房屋，為要在饑荒中買到五穀。”

en: And there were those who said, "We have borrowed money for the king's tax on our fields and our vineyards.
zh: 有些人說：“我們為了要借錢向王納稅，只好抵押了我們的田地和葡萄園。

en: Now our flesh is as the flesh of our brothers, our children are as their children. Yet we are forcing our sons and our daughters to be slaves, and some of our daughters have already been enslaved, but it is not in our power to help it, for other men have our fields and our vineyards."
zh: 雖然我們的身體與我們同胞的身體一樣，我們的兒女與他們的兒女也相同，可是我們卻要強迫自己的兒女去作僕婢，而且我們的女兒有些已經作了奴婢，我們卻無能為力，因為我們的田地和葡萄園已經屬於別人了。”

en: I was very angry when I heard their outcry and these words.
zh: 我聽見他們的哀叫和所講的這些事，就十分忿怒。

en: I took counsel with myself, and I brought charges against the nobles and the officials. I said to them, "You are exacting interest, each from his brother." And I held a great assembly against them
zh: 我心中籌算一番以後，就譴責貴族和官長，對他們說：“你們各人向自己的同胞貸款，竟然索取高利！”於是我召開大會攻擊他們。

en: and said to them, "We, as far as we are able, have bought back our Jewish brothers who have been sold to the nations, but you even sell your brothers that they may be sold to us!" They were silent and could not find a word to say.
zh: 我對他們說：“我們已盡了我們的能力，把那些賣了給外族人的同胞猶大人買贖回來，而你們還想要出賣你們的同胞，好讓我們再把他們買回來嗎？”他們都默不作聲，無話可說。

en: So I said, "The thing that you are doing is not good. Ought you not to walk in the fear of our God to prevent the taunts of the nations our enemies?
zh: 我又說：“你們這事作得不對。你們豈不應懷著敬畏我們 神的心行事為人，免遭我們的仇敵外族人的毀謗嗎？

en: Moreover, I and my brothers and my servants are lending them money and grain. Let us abandon this exacting of interest.
zh: 現在我和我的兄弟，以及我的僕人要把銀錢和五穀借給他們。讓我們大家都放棄放債取利吧！

en: Return to them this very day their fields, their vineyards, their olive orchards, and their houses, and the percentage of money, grain, wine, and oil that you have been exacting from them."
zh: 請你們今天就把他們的田地、葡萄園、橄欖園、房屋，以及你們向他們索取的利息：百分之一的利錢、五穀、新酒和新油，都歸還給他們。”

en: Then they said, "We will restore these and require nothing from them. We will do as you say." And I called the priests and made them swear to do as they had promised.
zh: 他們就說：“我們必定歸還，不再向他們要求利息了，你怎麼說，我們願意照著你說的去行。”我就把祭司們召了來，叫眾人起誓必照著這話去行。

en: I also shook out the fold of my garment and said, "So may God shake out every man from his house and from his labor who does not keep this promise. So may he be shaken out and emptied." And all the assembly said "Amen" and praised the LORD. And the people did as they had promised.
zh: 我抖著胸前的衣襟說：“不履行這話的，願 神也是這樣抖他離開他的家和產業，直到抖空。”全體會眾都說：“阿們！”又讚美耶和華。眾人都照著這話去行。

en: Moreover, from the time that I was appointed to be their governor in the land of Judah, from the twentieth year to the thirty-second year of Artaxerxes the king, twelve years, neither I nor my brothers ate the food allowance of the governor.
zh: 自從我奉命在猶大地作他們省長的日子以來，就是從亞達薛西王二十年，直到三十二年，共十二年，我和我的兄弟都沒有吃過省長的俸祿。

en: The former governors who were before me laid heavy burdens on the people and took from them for their daily ration forty shekels of silver. Even their servants lorded it over the people. But I did not do so, because of the fear of God.
zh: 在我們以先的前任省長，重壓人民，每日都向他們索取糧食和酒，以及四百五十六克銀子。連他們的僕人也轄制人民，但我因為敬畏 神，就不這樣行。

en: I also persevered in the work on this wall, and we acquired no land, and all my servants were gathered there for the work.
zh: 我堅持只重修城牆的工程；所以我們不購置田產，我所有的僕人也都聚集在那裡工作。

en: Moreover, there were at my table 150 men, Jews and officials, besides those who came to us from the nations that were around us.
zh: 在我桌上吃飯的，有一百五十個猶大人和官長，還有那些從我們四圍外族來到我們這裡的人；

en: Now what was prepared at my expense for each day was one ox and six choice sheep and birds, and every ten days all kinds of wine in abundance. Yet for all this I did not demand the food allowance of the governor, because the service was too heavy on this people.
zh: 每天預備牛一頭、肥羊六隻，又為我預備一些飛禽；每十天供應大量各類的酒。雖然這樣，我仍然沒有索取省長的俸祿，因為這些人服役已經負擔沉重。

en: Remember for my good, O my God, all that I have done for this people.
zh: “我的 神啊，求你記念我，記念我為這人民所作的一切事，施恩給我。”
